title: Remove unnecessary @ResponseBody annotations in Spring controllers
description: In Spring applications, methods in classes annotated with @RestController or methods already annotated with @ResponseBody do not require redundant @ResponseBody annotations. Removing these superfluous annotations improves code clarity and avoids confusion. This rule flags unnecessary uses of @ResponseBody.
recommendation: Remove @ResponseBody annotations from methods or classes where they are implied by @RestController or already present.

checks.message: @ResponseBody is superfluous in @RestController classes. Remove the @ResponseBody annotation.
